calendar.matters:
AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND ENTERING JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS


Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff American Express National Bank's Motion for Order Vacating Dismissal and Entering Judgment Against Defendants [sic] Pursuant to [Code of Civil Procedure] 664.6.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express National Bank's Motion for Order Vacating Dismissal and Entering Judgment Against Defendants Pursuant to [Code of Civil Procedure] 664.6, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. The court vacates dismissal and enters judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant for the sum of $6,394.27, plus costs of $74.52 for a total of $6,468.79.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'Sf Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants. Transferred to be heard on the law and motion calendar on the same day at 9:30am in Dept. 302. = (302/JPT)
